title: BEM-548.2 orchestrator workflow parity
objective:
Run script:
"""
workflows = Path('.github/workflows')
workflows.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
protocols = Path('governance/protocols')
protocols.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')

contract = protocols/'ROLE_ORCHESTRATOR_WORKFLOW_PARITY.md'
contract.write_text('# BEM-548.2 | Role-Orchestrator Workflow Parity\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:53 (UTC+3)\n\n## Source of truth\nBEM-543 corrected sequence:\nexternal -> curator_intake -> curator_assignment -> role-orchestrator -> analyst -> auditor -> executor -> auditor_final -> curator_closure.\n\n## Routing rules\n| Latest record | Condition | Next role |\n|---|---|---|\n| curator_assignment | task_type=development | analyst |\n| curator_assignment | task_type=audit | auditor |\n| curator_assignment | task_type=hotfix | auditor |\n| analysis | status=completed | auditor |\n| audit | decision=PASS_TO_EXECUTOR | executor |\n| execution | status=completed | auditor_final |\n| audit | decision=FINAL_PASS | curator_closure |\n| any failed/cancelled/timeout | any | curator |\n\n## Output\nEvery decision writes `role_orchestrator_decision` to `governance/transport/results.jsonl` and updates `governance/state/role_cycle_state.json`.\n')

wf = workflows/'role-orchestrator.yml'
wf_text = '''name: Role Orchestrator

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      cycle_id:
        description: Internal cycle id
        required: true
        type: string

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  orchestrate:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Decide next role from transport
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import json
          from pathlib import Path
          cycle_id = '${{ inputs.cycle_id }}'
          transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
          state_path = Path('governance/state/role_cycle_state.json')
          records = []
          task_type = None
          if transport.exists():
              for line in transport.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore').splitlines():
                  if not line.strip():
                      continue
                  try:
                      rec = json.loads(line)
                  except Exception:
                      continue
                  if rec.get('cycle_id') == cycle_id:
                      records.append(rec)
                      if rec.get('record_type') == 'curator_intake' and rec.get('task_type'):
                          task_type = rec.get('task_type')
          if records:
              latest = records[-1]
          else:
              latest = {'record_type': 'none', 'status': 'failed'}
          status = latest.get('status')
          record_type = latest.get('record_type')
          decision = 'route_to_curator'
          next_role = 'curator'
          reason = 'default_to_curator'
          blocker = None
          if status in ['failed', 'cancelled', 'timeout']:
              next_role = 'curator'
              decision = 'route_to_curator'
              reason = 'upstream_blocker'
              blocker = {'code': 'UPSTREAM_ROLE_FAILED', 'latest_record_type': record_type}
          elif record_type == 'curator_assignment':
              if task_type == 'development':
                  next_role = 'analyst'
                  reason = 'curator_assigned_development_task_to_orchestrator'
              elif task_type == 'audit':
                  next_role = 'auditor'
                  reason = 'curator_assigned_audit_task_to_orchestrator'
              elif task_type == 'hotfix':
                  next_role = 'auditor'
                  reason = 'curator_assigned_hotfix_to_auditor_first'
              decision = 'route_to_' + next_role
          elif record_type == 'analysis' and status == 'completed':
              next_role = 'auditor'
              decision = 'route_to_auditor'
              reason = 'analysis_completed_requires_audit'
          elif record_type == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR':
              next_role = 'executor'
              decision = 'route_to_executor'
              reason = 'audit_pass_to_executor'
          elif record_type == 'execution' and status == 'completed':
              next_role = 'auditor_final'
              decision = 'route_to_auditor_final'
              reason = 'execution_completed_requires_final_audit'
          elif record_type == 'audit' and latest.get('decision') == 'FINAL_PASS':
              next_role = 'curator_closure'
              decision = 'route_to_curator_closure'
              reason = 'final_audit_pass_returns_to_curator'
          out = {
              'record_type': 'role_orchestrator_decision',
              'cycle_id': cycle_id,
              'source': 'role-orchestrator.yml',
              'from_role': 'role_orchestrator',
              'to_role': next_role,
              'status': 'completed' if blocker is None else 'blocked',
              'decision': decision,
              'reason': reason,
              'input_record_type': record_type,
              'artifact_path': 'governance/transport/results.jsonl',
              'commit_sha': None,
              'blocker': blocker,
              'created_at': 'workflow_runtime'
          }
          transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
          with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
              f.write(json.dumps(out, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
          state = {}
          if state_path.exists():
              try:
                  state = json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
              except Exception:
                  state = {}
          state['cycle_id'] = cycle_id
          state['active_role'] = 'role_orchestrator'
          state['next_role'] = next_role
          state['last_orchestrator_decision'] = out
          state['blocker'] = blocker
          state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
          PY
      - name: Commit orchestration decision
        shell: bash
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/state/role_cycle_state.json
          git commit -m "Role orchestrator decision ${{ inputs.cycle_id }}" || echo "No changes"
          git push
'''
wf.write_text(wf_text)

# Static parity checks.
checks = {'workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'workflow_dispatch':'workflow_dispatch' in wf_text,'no_schedule':'schedule:' not in wf_text,'curator_assignment_rule':'curator_assignment' in wf_text,'development_to_analyst':'development' in wf_text and 'analyst' in wf_text,'analysis_to_auditor':'analysis_completed_requires_audit' in wf_text,'audit_to_executor':'PASS_TO_EXECUTOR' in wf_text,'execution_to_final':'auditor_final' in wf_text,'final_to_curator':'curator_closure' in wf_text,'writes_transport':'governance/transport/results.jsonl' in wf_text,'writes_state':'role_cycle_state.json' in wf_text,'no_issue_31':'#31' not in wf_text and 'issue_number: 31' not in wf_text}
ok = all(checks.values())

# Append a parity audit record.
record = {'record_type':'role_orchestrator_workflow_parity_audit','cycle_id':'bem548-2-orchestrator-workflow-parity','source':'gpt','status':'completed' if ok else 'failed','checks':checks,'artifact_path':'governance/reports/bem548_2_orchestrator_workflow_parity.md','commit_sha':None,'blocker':None if ok else {'code':'ORCHESTRATOR_WORKFLOW_PARITY_FAILED','checks':checks},'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:53 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

state = json.loads(state_path.read_text(errors='ignore')) if state_path.exists() else {}
state['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:53 (UTC+3)'
state['role_orchestrator_workflow_parity'] = {'status':'PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER','workflow':'.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml','checks':checks}
state['blocker'] = None if ok else {'code':'ORCHESTRATOR_WORKFLOW_PARITY_FAILED'}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(state, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

report = reports/'bem548_2_orchestrator_workflow_parity.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-548.2 | Role-Orchestrator Workflow Parity | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:53 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- `.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml` aligned with BEM-543 corrected decision logic.\n- `ROLE_ORCHESTRATOR_WORKFLOW_PARITY.md` created.\n- Static parity checks completed.\n\n## Checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else 'ORCHESTRATOR_WORKFLOW_PARITY_FAILED') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem548_2_orchestrator_workflow_parity.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-548.2 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': role-orchestrator workflow parity completed.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(contract), str(wf), str(transport), str(state_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-548.2 role-orchestrator workflow parity completed')
"""
No issue comments.
